send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Fashion Nova: Hey Noah, your order #143527038 is out for delivery and should be delivered TODAY!

You can track your order here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/azY3jBqrr7zR .

Fashion Nova: Hey Noah, your order #143527038 has been delivered! 

We hope you love everything inside! You can check your delivery details with the carrier here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/axqVEp-uXOnT .
Fashion Nova: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Terms: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/Vbi Privacy: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/EzD
Fashion Nova: You made the FN list! Now, use code FAM40 to get 40% OFF EVERYTHING! -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/awX3ow3N2lgm .

Fashion Nova: HURRY! The Friends & Family Sale Won't Last Long! Take 40% off with code: FAM40 ->
 http://sms.fashionnova.com/aG0tvb-M7RNa .

Fashion Nova: Hi Emily! Curious about a product or want to make a purchase? We're happy to provide more details or make recommendations!

Reply with any questions you have!
Yes I have questions
Fashion Nova: I would be more than happy to help out, ask away!

I encountered a problem with a recent purchase from your store.

I bought a Halloween costume on 10/08/2024 , and unfortunately I noticed a malfunction with the item. Specifically, after pulling it out the zipper on my dress is broken. I cannot even try on the item due to the zipper being broken. Everything else I received is in great condition. 
As I am a new customer I would appreciate any assistance you can offer to resolve this issue. I would be happy to return the item or provide any additional details.

Fashion Nova: Thank you for clarifying and I'm very sorry for all the inconvenience. Surely, this isn't the experience we want you to have. This issue will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/abxdjnWM_Odm and beginning an inquiry with our team!
I did not use my email and it doesn't let me reach out to anyone

Fashion Nova: I'm sorry to hear about that! I see an order placed last 10/05, Order #143527038. I also noticed that there is an email associated with the order however, I am unable to see it due to security reasons. If you are looking to have your order returned, you can do so here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/akl0bbJs08B9 Please let me know if you have additional questions, I'll be here!
Yes I have not received a response Well it's a Halloween costume I need a replacement Asap
Fashion Nova: To confirm, did you complete the return process using the link above?

I tried it won't let me even start any return due to the fact that I did not use my email . I don't need a return I would just like an exchange the costume is beautiful only thing is I cannot even try it on due to the zipper being broken.

Fashion Nova: I understand. We do not offer exchanges but we welcome you to return your item(s) by mail in accordance with our Return Policy by using our online returns portal and repurchasing any available item(s) on our site.

What's your full name and shipping address?

So I have to return my costume wait for you all to process that then re order my costume and wait for it to come in? Plus pay taxes and shipping again???? Because the costume you guys sent me has a broken zipper??? 

Emily Rodriguez 
1423 Hummingbird San Antonio Tx 78245

Fashion Nova: I'm very sorry about that! We always aim to provide the best customer service so I'll make sure to pass along your feedback to my team for future improvements. Since you received a damaged item, I'd suggest visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/areo1C0V2uP3 and beginning an inquiry with our team.
Once again I have tried to visit that link and because I did not use my email it says they cannot find an order in my name.
I need a number I can call this is no help

Fashion Nova: Thank you for the screenshot. I'm sorry, but we do not currently offer phone support at this time. I understand the system is not recognizing any orders with your account. I suggest you reach out to us through the link, but instead, click on "Payments & General Question" then click on "I have a general question" and lastly click "No, it's a general question". This will give you the option to send our team a message so you can explain there the situation with your order. 

I hope this helps! Let me know how it goes.

I've tried that as well lol this is crazy first time and last time I will make sure I put this on my social media Most definitely not a company I'd want to give my business too . Also where can I leave a review ???

Fashion Nova: I understand your concern and I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. As much as I would love to help you, I'm afraid my system isn't set up to help you solve this issue. Please get in touch with our customer support team, as they're much more equipped to help you with this. The best way is through the link and follow the steps I provided and you should be able to send our team a message so you can explain your situation. Rest assured our team is happy to help you. Look out for our review-request email. And remember, you can rave about your FN favs on our site anytime. Let me know if you have any other questions.
How can I change my address on an order that was placed?
Fashion Nova: It can only done via our customer team. Can you share what email are you trying to use on the link I shared?

templates: For custom full vehicle covers use FVC shortcut
For cx that can't see the cover pattern/images of their vehicle use CPI shortcut
If we don't have a pattern/color the cx is looking for use PRR shortcut
dos_and_donts: Do not tell customers that the base price is the final price! The cost changes by the fitment and depends on the vehicle
Rebates are discounts for this brand!
Custom dim pattern sheets are only available for Vehicle Covers (Car, Truck, Van,RV)
drive_to_purchase: Before sharing any product links, confirm the vehicle’s Year, Make, and Model

What do I do about this?

SA Company: Thanks for reaching out and for sending the photo! I'm sorry for what happened to your item. For loss/damage claims, you must notify us within 30 days of the date of your purchase if you believe all or part of your order is missing or damaged.

To do this, please email your request to help@sateam.company or feel free to call this number +1 (888) 704-0358, Monday-Friday 9:30am-5:30pm, and Saturday-Sunday 10am-6pm EST. 

In the meantime, is there anything else I could help you out with? Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here!

SA Company: Happy Flag Day! In honor of it we have released our Limited Edition Straw Hat The Patriot. Limited quantity available ONLY 500

Shop Now
https://safishing.attn.tv/aYbohueFYnti

I have left two messages to cancel an order and nobody has called me back. After I placed the two calls to cancel it ended up shipping out. Then The order came in and was damaged and I sent an email and I have yet to get a response. What am I doing wrong??
This is what the order looked like when it arrived yesterday

SA Company: I'm really sorry about this and surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. Please ship back the items you'd like to return to our facility at: 2045 High Ridge Rd, Suite A, Boynton Beach, FL 33426, with a note explaining what you would like (full refund or exchange).You can start your return here: https://safishing.attn.tv/aHjEl9ZPRk-W can check out our detailed return policy here - https://safishing.attn.tv/awEXRyO_TvMR.
Stuff happens and I get it but the fact that nobody returns my calls or emails is infuriating. I have to resort to text messages to get my information on how to handle my situation.

SA Company: We're very sorry for the inconvenience and I understand your frustration. Let me check on this with my team. Is this order #3829134? If so, can you provide me with the email address associated with it?
Im currently at work
SA Company: Thank you for confirming the order number! I appreciate that you're being patient and having this conversation despite being at work. Can you please share your email address with me?
651greco651@gmail.com
SA Company: Thank you for sharing! I'll check with my team and give you an update soon. Hang tight!
Anything yet? Still no response to phone call or email!!
SA Company: I'm still waiting to hear back from the team. Rest assured I will reach out to you as soon as I hear back.

Get Your 20% Off Now: https://bonobos.attn.tv/aFQ2qDUEVpWe 

Terms apply.

Bonobos: 🎵 Don't wanna close this text, we don't wanna fall out of touch, 'cause we'd miss you baby, and we don't want you to miss a thing 🎵 

Be sure to add us to your contacts so you don't miss out on VIP Early Access to sales and other promotions!

Bonobos: Now that we're in your contacts, how about you get in our pants? Not like that. 

Maybe start with The Chino 2.0?: https://bonobos.attn.tv/aKZXW4nutmFF

or DISCOUNT for info on available promos.
